name: Genshin Impact - RPG (V6.6!)
description:
Genshin Impact - RPG :

You'll not either be Aether or Lumine like it's yourself adventuring around Teyvat as you liked and can do story

Archon Quest :

Prologue : Act I,II,III

Liyue : Act I,II,III,IV

Inazuma : Prologue,Act I,II,III,IV

Sumeru : Act I,II,III,IV,V,VI

Fontaine : Act I,II,III,IV,V,VI

Natlan : Act I,II,III,IV,Interude,V,VI

Nod-Krai : Prelude,Act I,II,III,IV,V,VI,VII,VIII

Feature you need to try :

Firstly : I made a feature alike my dating sim series about you have heart event where each 2 heart will have a special event for that character to make you closer to them to trigger it [Trigger ... Heart Event for (your choices of character)] try it!

Secondly : I made character stats too like building character like in genshin but in early day it come out it maybe just pure stats then I’ll added up talents

Thirdly : Exploration is fun here try getting material for you to leveling up your ally

Fourth : Try Cooking to help you in battle and also get you to get closer to your friends
